hero.headline:
AI Levels
the Playing
Field
hero.subtitle:
We dismantle inequality in learning, opportunity, geography, and culture
to give everyone the same starting line.

education.label: EDUCATION
education.headline:
Rewriting the Economics
of Education Production
education.desc: Traditional education video production requires scriptwriters, studio bookings, voice actors, camera crews, and post-production editors — costing tens of thousands of dollars and weeks of lead time. Veltis AI Studio replaces the entire chain with a single AI pipeline. Input a script, and the system handles lesson planning, AI instructor generation, voice synthesis, and editing to deliver a finished education video.

veltisStudio.title: Veltis AI Studio
veltisStudio.subtitle: End-to-End Education Video Automation
veltisStudio.desc: Feed in a script, get a finished video featuring an AI avatar instructor. An end-to-end pipeline that produces studio-grade educational content without cameras, editors, or voice actors. This is our core operating product.

veltisSign.title: Veltis Sign
veltisSign.subtitle: Sign Language Accessibility Module
veltisSign.desc: Built on Korean Sign Language (KSL) 3D motion capture data, our system automatically generates avatar videos performing sign language from text input. An accessibility module running on the Veltis pipeline, delivering equal learning opportunities for hearing-impaired students.

dataset.label: DATA INFRASTRUCTURE
dataset.title: KSL-EDU 3D
dataset.subtitle: Korean Sign Language Motion Dataset
dataset.desc: We are building a 950-clip Korean Sign Language 3D motion capture dataset from the ground up. Korea's first high-precision sign language AI training data for education, research, and commercialization.

socialFinance.label: SOCIAL & FINANCE
socialFinance.headline:
Expert Knowledge,
Everyone's Tool
socialFinance.desc: We apply AI to professional domains — startups, marketing, real estate, finance — to close knowledge gaps, while expanding into African emerging markets with Cameroon as our base.

services.title: Startup AI
services.desc: Business plan generation, incorporation guides, fundraising simulations. AI handles the groundwork at every stage of the startup journey.

services.title: Marketing Automation
services.desc: From ad copy generation to performance analytics. SMBs gain enterprise-grade marketing capabilities through AI.

services.title: Real Estate Intelligence
services.desc: AI-powered market analysis and investment simulation eliminate information asymmetry. Data replaces intuition.

services.title: Finance AI
services.desc: Personal asset management automation, portfolio analysis, financial literacy education. Expert-level insight available to everyone.

services.title: Africa Business
services.desc: Trade brokerage, university education platforms, technology export. Real business operations across Africa with Cameroon as the base.

africa.label: AFRICA INITIATIVE
africa.headline:
Africa Strategy,
Starting from Cameroon
africa.desc: We operate resource trade, AI education platforms, and technology export businesses with local partners in Cameroon. Building a sustainable growth foundation through ODA-linked projects and local startup incubation.

entertainment.label: ENTERTAINMENT
entertainment.headline:
Creative Tools
for Everyone
entertainment.desc: We apply AI avatar technology to content production, gaming, and music. Opening an era where studio-quality output is possible without studios or specialized equipment.

services.title: AI Content Studio
services.desc: AI avatar-based dramas, webtoon-adapted animations, short-form series production. Studio-quality video content without actors or physical shoots.

services.title: AI Game Development
services.desc: AI-generated characters, procedural stories, player-adaptive difficulty. Small teams achieving the depth of major titles.

services.title: AI Music Production
services.desc: AI composition, vocal synthesis, sound design automation. Producing commercial-grade music without a music degree.

vision.label: OUR VISION
vision.headline:
AI Levels
the Playing
Field
vision.desc: One philosophy runs through every business. AI is not a tool for a specific industry — it is infrastructure that redesigns the structure of inequality.

pillars.title: Education Equality
pillars.desc: Production that once cost tens of thousands and took weeks now takes minutes. Building infrastructure so everyone can access the same quality of education, beyond barriers of language and disability.

pillars.title: Economic Opportunity
pillars.desc: Democratizing expert knowledge in startups, finance, and real estate through AI. Technology closes the gaps created by information asymmetry, opening the same doors for everyone.

pillars.title: Cultural Access
pillars.desc: Creating content, developing games, and producing music without studios or specialized equipment. Distributing tools for creativity equally, closing the gap in cultural experience.

pillars.title: Global Connection
pillars.desc: From Seoul to Cameroon. AI becomes the bridge that connects opportunities beyond geographical inequality. Supporting emerging market growth through technology export and education platforms.
